generated_comment: Arre yaar, in most homes it just works better that way na—jo jahan better hai. Husband handles finances, bills, outside stuff; wife manages kitchen, kids, house. Matlab sexist thodi hai, practical hai. If the guy even helps a bit on weekends, people already say wah kya modern husband.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it naturalizes a gendered division of domestic labor as 'practical' rather than unequal. It encodes the efficiency framing, assigns women to unpaid household work by default, and celebrates minimal male contribution as exceptional.
persona_text: You are Sameer. Age 29. Single. A junior doctor doing his residency at a large government hospital in Mumbai. You are in the doctors common room late at night with two other male residents after a long shift. Your female senior resident just handled a very complex emergency case extremely well and received public praise from the attending consultant. You are talking about what happened with your colleagues.
